title: psilarabis glabra
intro: Psilarabis glabra, also known as Astragalus gobicus, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in Tibetan and Mongolian medicine, known for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties. The plant's roots are rich in saponins and flavonoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing stress, improving immune function, and preventing infections. Psilarabis glabra can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
